Machine Learning Algorithms and Their Practical Applications
...
- Gradient Boosting Machines (GBM): Tackles errors sequentially.
- Deep Learning Neural Networks: Imitates complex brain processes.
- Principal Component Analysis (PCA): Reduces data dimensionality.
- Artificial Neural Networks (ANN): Ideal for pattern recognition.
- Linear Regression: Essential for predicting values.
- Logistic Regression: Useful for binary classification.
- Naive Bayes: Quick, effective text classification.
- K-Means Clustering: Ideal for market segmentation.
- K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN): No model training needed.
- Support Vector Machines: Great for image classification.
- Random Forest: Handles large data sets well.
- Decision Trees: Simplifies complex decision-making.
...

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mohan-nayak-49954392_deeplearning-deeplearningai-deeplearningalgorithms-activity-7165340420368007168-MxQp
...
Activity: Keshav Basandrai
...
Deep learning has found applications across various domains due to its ability to learn complex patterns and representations directly from data. Here are some common use cases of deep learning:
...
☑️ Natural Language Processing (NLP):
   - Sentiment analysis.
   - Named entity recognition.
   - Machine translation.
   - Text summarization.
   - Question-answering systems.
...
☑️ Recommendation Systems:
   - Personalized product recommendations (e.g., Amazon, Netflix).
   - Content
...
.g., YouTube, Spotify).
...
☑️ Generative Models:
   - Generating realistic images (e.g., DeepDream, StyleGAN).
   - Generating text (e.g., language modeling with GPT).
   - Music generation.
...
☑️ Anomaly Detection:
   - Fraud detection in financial transactions.
   - Intrusion detection in cybersecurity.
   - Equipment failure prediction in manufacturing.
...
☑️ Finance:
   - Stock market prediction.
   - Algorithmic trading.
   - Credit scoring and risk assessment.
...
These are just a few examples, and the applications of deep learning continue to expand as researchers and practitioners explore new ways to leverage its capabilities.

results.title: James Stewart
highlights:
Data Architect at Ingersoll Rand
...
Data Architect at [Ingersoll Rand](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ingersoll-rand)
...
#### Data Architect (Current)
...
I build enterprise data platforms that help global manufacturing organizations make smarter decisions — faster. My focus is turning messy, multi-system data (SAP, Oracle, PLM, and more) into clean, trusted analytics that procurement, supply chain, and engineering teams can actually use. I specialize in combining modern cloud data architecture with AI to automate the work that used to take days — things like classifying parts, extracting specs from engineering drawings, forecasting demand, and finding savings buried across dozens of locations. Day to day, that looks like: Designing spend analytics platforms across global ERP landscapes Building AI pipelines that read, classify, and structure unstructured data using LLMs and OCR Developing ML forecasting models for demand and operations planning Automating trade compliance and commodity classification at scale Creating the "single source of truth" data layers that power BI and decision-making My path here wasn't traditional — Navy Nuclear Power, Supply Corps logistics, and a Master's in Music before moving into IT. A decade embedded in global procurement gave me a deep understanding of the business before I ever started building the data platforms that support it. That means I don't just build the pipelines — I understand the problems they're solving. Tech: Snowflake (Cortex AI, ML, SPCS) | Python | Advanced SQL | Qlik | SAP | Oracle | PTC WindChill
...

Activity: Bijivemula Siva Sathish kumar Reddy liked
...
📁 Day 06/30 – dbt Project Structure
...
A clean dbt project structure = scalable & maintainable analytics engineering 🚀
...
📂 models/ → SQL transformations  
📂 seeds/ → CSV reference data  
📂 snapshots/ → Track historical changes  
📂 macros/ → Reusable Jinja logic  
📂 analyses/ → Ad-hoc SQL analysis  
📄 schema.yml → Tests & documentation  
📄 dbt_project.yml → Main project configuration  

💡 Best Practice Layering:
...
🔹 staging → clean raw data  
🔹 intermediate → business logic  
🔹 marts → analytics-ready models
...
🔥 Why this matters:
...
📸 Follow: @learn.with.prakash for daily dbt & Data Engineering content. #dbt #AnalyticsEngineering #DataEngineering #SQL #DataTransformation #ModernDataStack #ELT #CloudData #DataWarehouse #TechLearning #DataModels #BigData #LearnInPublic

results.title: Dhanush P S
highlights:
Data Analyst at [Ingersoll Rand](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ingersoll-rand)
...
### Data Analyst at [Ingersoll Rand](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ingersoll-rand) (Current)
...
As a Data Analyst with expertise in predictive and descriptive maintenance for compressors, my professional mandate is to drive operational efficiency and prolong equipment lifespan. I combine a deep understanding of data analytics with domain knowledge and strategic business insight to influence decision-making and bolster customer relations. Technical Skills: Python: For data manipulation, analysis, and machine learning. SQL: For database queries, and creating views and tables. Excel: For data manipulation and visual reporting. GCP: For scalable data processing and model deployment. NLP: For extracting insights from text. GitLab: For code management and collaboration. Maintenance Data Analysis: I am tasked with scrutinizing a vast array of maintenance data, inspecting reports, repair logs, and sensor readings to gauge equipment health and inform maintenance strategies that mitigate downtime and enhance durability. Predictive Modeling: A crucial aspect of my work involves creating machine learning models to forecast maintenance needs, which involves: 1. Rigorous data preprocessing to assure data quality. 2. Feature selection to pinpoint variables that affect equipment health. 3. Developing and tuning predictive algorithms. 4. Validating model accuracy to ensure reliable predictions. Operational Optimization: I analyze past data to pinpoint optimal operating conditions for compressors, thereby reducing energy usage and preventing failures. My predictive models are key to: Planning maintenance work proactively. Reducing unexpected operational stoppages. Streamlining inventory management for maintenance components. Sales Strategy Contribution: I apply analytical insights to identify upselling and cross-selling opportunities, segmenting customers based on predictive data to target potential interest in additional services. Show less
...
Began my career journey through a Data Scientist Apprenticeship program at the International School of Engineering (INSOFE) in March 2022. Developed a strong foundation in data science through comprehensive training in Python, statistics, SQL, Tableau, Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, and Big Data. Leveraged exceptional performance to secure a full-time Data Scientist position at the company in February 2023. As a Data Scientist, it was pivotal in the company's data-driven decision-making process. I have analyzed complex datasets, developed statistical models, and provided actionable insights to optimize operations. My knowledge in EDA, statistical analysis, and machine learning algorithms also contributed to fast-paced work with time management and efficiency. Responsibilities: 1. Collect, clean, and preprocess large datasets from various sources using tools such as MS Excel, Python, and R Language. 2. Apply advanced statistical techniques and machine learning algorithms to extract valuable insights and patterns from data. 3. Develop predictive models and algorithms to optimize business processes, enhance customer experience, and drive revenue growth. 4. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify business problems and design data-driven solutions. 5. Perform exploratory data analysis to uncover hidden trends and opportunities for improvement. Present complex findings and insights in a clear and concise manner to stakeholders, including non-technical audiences using certain tools such as Tableau and PowerBI. 6. Continuously evaluate and improve the performance of existing models and algorithms with the help of hyperparameter tuning. Stay up to date with the latest advancements in data science and
...
learning technologies. Show less

results.title: Demand and Lead Generation Specialist job at Ingersoll Rand in Davidson, NC | Hirevector
highlights:
Demand and Lead Generation Specialist job at Ingersoll Rand in Davidson, NC | Hirevector
...
# Demand and Lead Generation Specialist job at Ingersoll Rand in Davidson, NC
...
Title: Demand and Lead Generation Specialist
...
- Job Title: Demand and Lead Generation Specialist
- Location: Remote - Davidson, NC area
...
- Job Overview:
...
- Ingersoll Rand is seeking a Demand Generation Specialist for our Power Tool and Lifting Division. This professional will report to the Demand Generation Manager. This key position has the unique opportunity to make a positive impact for the Power Tools and Lifting division. The Demand Generation Specialist works directly with Product Management, Marketing and Sales leadership to execute on both demand and lead generation activities identified as critical to facilitating growth in key product lines and strategic initiatives.
...
This role supports the Sales function through targeted nurture campaigns designed to advance known contacts through the Buyers Journey to Sales engagement, and to convert unknown prospects to qualified leads for Sales. This role will utilize the Email marketing automation platform (i.e., Eloqua) and Social Media Channels (Facebook, Instagram and LinkedIn) to fully leverage its capabilities and maximize its potential to develop, track, and measure the effectiveness of digital marketing efforts and will work with corporate demand center to ensure seamless CRM and Eloqua integration.
...
Responsibilities:
...
- Collaborates with Product Management and Sales Leadership to translate strategic priorities and campaign concepts into technical execution to advance prospects through the buyers journey, grow our funnel of qualified leads, and facilitate increased quote and order activity.
...
- Executes digital marketing strategies (e.g., standalone email blasts, drip campaigns, and integrated nurture campaigns) to increase visibility and drive demand for key product categories and solutions (Eloqua platform).
...
- Manages a Content Marketing responsibility to optimize landing pages, blogs and campaigns in the Demand Generation.
...
- Works with design team to develop content relevant to our targeted demand and lead generation campaigns, ensuring new content is created for the customer at each stage of the buying journey.
...
- Drive engagement with digital assets through SEO, landing pages, social media channels, emails and search engine advertising.
...
- Develops customer profiles/buyer personas to facilitate segmentation for marketing efforts based on key demographics including target markets, key accounts, buyer roles, etc.
...
- Uses data analytics to assess, measure, and quantify the efficacy of lead generation tactics (Google Analytics). Uses these analytics to report actionable results and as the basis for continuous improvement, the development of prospecting targets, and opportunities for further sales enablement.
...
- Bachelors degree in Marketing or a marketing-related field
- 1-3 years of experience in marketing automation/lead generation role
...
- Strong written, verbal and presentation skills, with a passion for creative content development and the ability to effectively articulate customer value propositions and brand positioning
- Proven ability to manage/execute concurrent projects in a fast-paced, collaborative environment
- Strong analytical skills with a data-driven mindset, attention to detail, and organizational skills
- Energetic, results-oriented approach with a strong sense of accountability
- Intellectual curiosity
...
- 3 years of experience with digital content/campaign development tools and marketing automation platforms (Eloqua, etc.), as well as lead generation in a B2B environment preferred
- Experience with video editing tools and techniques (Adobe Premiere, etc.) a plus
- Proficiency with Microsoft Office tools (e.g., PowerPoint, Excel, Outlook, etc.)
- 2 years of experience working in Salesforce, or a similar CRM tool preferred

results.title: Johnson Controls – Associate Software Engineer (Data Scientist) - Job Society
highlights:
Johnson Controls is seeking a talented and passionate Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist to join its Data Science & AI team in Pune. This role is an excellent opportunity for aspiring data science professionals who want to work on advanced machine learning, artificial intelligence, and cloud-based analytics solutions. As part of a global technology-driven organization, you will contribute to building intelligent systems that transform complex business challenges into data-driven solutions. The position offers exposure to cutting-edge technologies including machine learning, deep learning, generative AI, cloud computing, and MLOps, making it an ideal opportunity for professionals looking to accelerate their careers in the rapidly evolving field of data science.
...
In this role, you will collaborate with data engineers, AI specialists, cloud architects, and business stakeholders to develop scalable machine learning models and AI-powered applications. You will work extensively with Python, SQL, Microsoft Azure, Azure Machine Learning, Azure Databricks, and Azure OpenAI services to create intelligent solutions that generate measurable business value. The position involves the complete machine learning lifecycle, including data preparation, feature engineering, model development, deployment, monitoring, and optimization. By leveraging advanced analytics and cloud-native technologies, you will help build predictive and automated systems that improve operational efficiency and business decision-making.
...
The Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist role provides an exceptional platform for learning and innovation. Johnson Controls encourages continuous skill development through mentorship programs, certification sponsorships, and hands-on exposure to enterprise-scale AI and machine learning projects. You will gain experience working with modern technologies such as Generative AI, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), deep learning frameworks, and cloud-based MLOps solutions. This position is ideal for candidates who are eager to solve real-world business problems using data, artificial intelligence, and advanced analytics while contributing to transformative technology initiatives within a globally recognized organization.
...
• Utilize Azure OpenAI and other AI services to develop intelligent applications, automation solutions, and generative AI-powered business capabilities.
...
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics, or a related field.
...
• Understanding of machine learning concepts including supervised learning, unsupervised learning, feature engineering, model evaluation, and hyperparameter tuning.
...
• Experience working with deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow or PyTorch for developing AI and neural network-based solutions.
...
• Understanding of Natural Language Processing (NLP), large language models, Hugging Face libraries, spaCy, NLTK, or related AI technologies is advantageous.
...
• Knowledge of Generative AI, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and prompt engineering concepts will be highly beneficial.
...
The expected salary for an Associate Software Engineer – Data Scientist at Johnson Controls in Pune typically ranges between ₹8 LPA and ₹16 LPA, depending on educational background, technical expertise, project experience, cloud certifications, and machine learning proficiency. Candidates with strong Azure cloud knowledge, hands-on AI and machine learning experience, deep learning expertise, and exposure to Generative AI technologies may receive compensation toward the higher end of the range, along with performance incentives, certification sponsorships, learning benefits, and long-term career growth opportunities.

results.title: Scientific Lead, Generative AI Engineer, Applied Intelligence for Discovery job with Eli Lilly and Company | 3055061
highlights:
Scientific Lead, Generative AI Engineer, Applied Intelligence for Discovery job with Eli Lilly and Company | 3055061
...
# Scientific Lead, Generative AI Engineer, Applied Intelligence for Discovery
...
Employer Eli Lilly and Company Location San Francisco, California Start date Jun 15, 2026
...
## Job Details
...
We are building something unprecedented, an AI foundation that will fundamentally change how drug discovery research is conducted.
...
The Applied Intelligence for Discovery (AI4D) team is a newly formed group within Lilly Research Laboratories that operates at the intersection of scientific delivery and core platform development. AI4D’s mission is to connecting scientists to petabyte-scale data through natural language interfaces, automated analysis workflows, and intelligent search — and to convert early deployments into repeatable system standards and evaluation practices that scale across therapeutic areas.
...
As a Generative AI Engineer, you will design, build, and operate the core AI systems that power this transformation: retrieval-augmented generation over internal scientific documents, text-to-SQL over complex omics databases, agentic workflows that automate multi-step analyses, and the evaluation infrastructure that able the next-generation of medicines for patients.
...
Key Responsibilities
...
Design, build, and optimize RAG pipelines over internal publications, study reports, electronic lab notebooks, and other scientific documents
...
Build hybrid retrieval systems combining vector search with structured metadata, knowledge graphs, and ontology-aware filtering
...
Build and optimize text-to-SQL systems over Lilly’s databases, enabling scientists to query gene expression, proteomics, pathway, and variant data through natural language
...
Develop schema documentation, semantic annotations, and gold-standard question/SQL pairs that bridge how scientists think about data and how it is stored
...
Implement multi-step reasoning approaches (chain-of-thought, self-correction, Reflexion loops) to improve accuracy on complex scientific queries
...
Design agentic AI workflows that chain database queries, bioinformatics tools, literature search, and visualization into automated multi-step scientific analyses
...
Evaluate and integrate emerging orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, custom architectures) for scientific use cases
...
Build evaluation frameworks measuring accuracy, reliability, and scientific validity of AI outputs
...
PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field with 0-3+ years of experience; or equivalent experience building production LLM systems; MS in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field with 5+ years of experience; or equivalent experience building production LLM systems
...
Experience building LLM-powered applications, including at least two of: RAG systems, text-to-SQL, agentic workflows, or fine-tuning pipelines
...
Strong software engineering skills in Python with experience building production-grade systems
...
Deep familiarity with the modern LLM ecosystem: embedding models, vector databases, and orchestration frameworks
...
Experience designing evaluation frameworks for LLM systems — systematic approaches to measuring accuracy, detecting hallucinations, and tracking regressions
...
Comfort working with complex, heterogeneous data — databases with hundreds of tables, specialized schemas, or domain-specific vocabularies
...
Familiarity with
...
Familiarity with biomedical data types (omics, clinical, molecular) or scientific databases
...
Experience with MLOps/LLMOps tooling: experiment tracking, model registries, prompt versioning, A/B testing for AI systems
...
Knowledge of biomedical ontologies (Gene Ontology, MeSH, ChEBI) or experience integrating domain-specific knowledge into LLM systems
...

results.title: Sr. Director, AI Architecture at GE Aerospace | Jeremy
highlights:
# Sr. Director, AI Architecture
...
Senior technical leader architecting AI-enabled engineering capabilities for aero engine and propulsion systems, managing a team of five AI engineers while ensuring compliance with aerospace security and export control constraints.
...
AWS Kubernetes Azure Docker GCP PyTorch TensorFlow CI/CD Agile Microservices AI LLM Monitoring Cloud Infrastructure RAG API Design Data Governance MLOps Model Training Data Engineering Software Architecture Enterprise Architecture Vector Database Model Deployment Model-Based Systems Engineering Security Architecture
...
The AI Architect is the senior technical leader for the team building AI enabled engineering capabilities across the business organizations of an aero engine and propulsion OEM. The role sets the reference architecture, selects and sequences the use cases worth pursuing, validates feasibility through proof of concept builds, and leads and coaches the engineers who deliver them, ensuring everything the team ships is deliverable inside aerospace constraints on data, security, and export control. It pairs hands on technical ownership with the second line leadership, operating plan and budget ownership, and governance responsibilities of the Sr. Director, Architecture (SPB1) standard, with five AI Engineers, one aligned to each business, as direct reports (growing to include team leads), and the mandate to grow the function as the portfolio expands. Deep credibility in the physics and engineering of the product, turbomachinery, aerodynamics, combustion, heat transfer, structures, and materials, and a product mindset shaped by certified, safety critical hardware are core to the role; AI is applied to challenging propulsion and turbomachinery engineering problems across design, analysis, test, manufacturing, and sustainment, not treated as a specialty unto itself.

results.title: Staff Machine Learning/MLOps Engineer at Anduril Industries · JobsRadar
highlights:
Staff Machine Learning/MLOps Engineer at Anduril Industries · JobsRadar
...
Staff Machine Learning/MLOps Engineer
...
We are seeking a Staff Machine Learning/MLOps Engineer to join the Applied Intelligence team within Maritime Digital Production. You will lead the design, deployment, and sustainment of the AI-enabled backbone that connects data, tools, and people across our digital shipbuilding environment. This role focuses on operationalizing advanced models and architecting the industrial AI stack—selecting, integrating, and standardizing technologies that bring intelligence into production systems only where they deliver real value.You’ll define and implement core components of the platform, including unified data and feature stores, vector databases, orchestration layers, and model-serving frameworks, while integrating off-the-shelf models for computer vision, OCR/IDP, speech, and retrieval-augmented generation. You’ll work across software, data, manufacturing, and corporate technology teams to translate real factory scenarios—inspection, root-cause analysis, receiving workflows, scheduling—into applied AI capabilities with clear human-in-the-loop controls, auditability, safety gates, and integrations with PLM, MES, CMMS, ERP, and the unified data plane.This role demands technical range, judgment, and an instinct for when AI is the right tool versus when a simpler logic or workflow solution wins. You’ll collaborate across Anduril in a high-tech, fast-paced culture of innovation focused on delivering systems that work in the real world. If you want to shape how AI becomes a practical, reliable tool for production and logistics at scale, you’ll be helping build the future of digital shipbuilding and the next generation of maritime vehicles.
...
- Architect and own the AI/ML platform stack—from data ingestion, labeling, and feature engineering to model training, deployment, monitoring, and lifecycle management.
...
- Select, prioritize, and standardize industrial AI components including feature stores, vector databases + RAG, OCR/IDP and CV/STT providers, orchestration layers, and observability systems.
...
- Build model-serving and inference frameworks optimized for production environments, supporting real-time and batch execution across cloud, edge, and shop-floor systems.
...
- Translate factory scenarios (receiving, inspection, RCCA, scheduling) into applied AI workflows with defined human-in-the-loop gates, audit trails, and integration contracts with PLM, MES, CMMS, ERP, and the unified data plane.
...
- Implement event-driven data pipelines and telemetry systems that feed models with contextualized, real-time signals from production and logistics systems.
...
- Mentor junior engineers and data scientists; establish best practices for MLOps, observability, data management, and secure handling of sensitive production data.
...
- 8+ years of experience in software or ML engineering with end-to-end delivery of production-grade AI/ML systems.
...
MLOps: data acquisition, labeling, curation, pipeline management, model versioning, continuous integration, and model monitoring.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python and experience with deep learning frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow).

We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.

...

...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. # Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.

- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
